info.title: Job Search Platform API
info.description: API Documentation for Job Search Platform Project

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users with optional filtering.
Get a specific user details.
Get user statistics.
Returns a paginated list of companies including their verification status.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (Unverified, Pending, Verified, Rejected)

get.description: Get a temporary link for a verification document.

get.summary: Get AI match analysis for an application
get.description: Returns the AI screening match score, notes, and detailed CV-Job compatibility breakdown.

get.summary: Get AI analysis of a CV
get.description: Returns scores, strengths, gaps, and improvement recommendations for a CV.

403.description: Unauthorized — only the CV owner can view analysis

404.description: No analysis found for this CV

message.example: No analysis found for this CV

get.summary: Get skill gap analysis for a CV
get.description: Returns a list of skills the job seeker is missing compared to market demands.
Returns the CV match score for a specific job without actually applying.

get.summary: Get market skill and job trends
get.description: Returns the most in-demand skills and trending jobs based on active job ads.
Returns the user's most recent active career roadmap from the database.

message.example: No active career roadmap found. Generate one first.

post.description: Uses AI to generate a step-by-step career roadmap based on the user's CV and a target role. The AI call is synchronous — the response may take several seconds.

403.description: Unauthorized — only job seekers can generate a roadmap

message.example: Unauthorized: Only job seekers can generate a career roadmap.
The target role field is required.

post.description: Triggers the market trends analysis process manually. Restricted to Admins.

get.description: Returns a list of applications submitted by the current job seeker.

job_id.description: ID of the job to apply for

cv_id.description: ID of an existing internal CV (required if cv file is not provided)

cv.description: PDF resume file (required if cv_id is not provided)

JobSeekerName.description: Override full name for this application

get.description: Get a specific application.

post.summary: Auto apply to a matching job
post.description: Finds the best matching active job for the provided CV and applies automatically.

get.description: Get applications for a job (for employers).

200.description: List of applications for the job

get.description: Returns the health status of the API
Returns the current application locale. Language can be changed by sending the X-Locale header (en, ar), the locale query parameter, or the Accept-Language header.

post.description: Creates a new user account with email and password.

password.description: Must contain letters and numbers, min 8 chars

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a token.

get.description: Returns the redirection URL for social login (Google/LinkedIn).

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Optional role to assign if a new account is created (JobSeeker, Employer).

get.description: Handles the callback from social providers.
Get current authenticated user.

post.description: Verifies the password reset code before changing password.
Sets a new password using a valid reset token.

get.description: Returns a list of CVs created by the authenticated job seeker.
Returns full details of a specific CV, including skills, education, experience, etc.

post.description: Dispatches the analysis pipeline (parse → score → AI explain) for an existing CV. Useful for CVs created before auto-analysis was enabled, or to re-analyze after updating CV data.

put.description: Update an education entry in CV.
Update an experience entry in CV.
Update a language entry in CV.
Update a certification entry in CV.

post.description: Add generic custom section to CV

put.description: Update a custom section in CV.

post.summary: Extract structured data from a CV file
post.description: Upload a PDF or DOCX file to extract its contents automatically using AI.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all verified companies with optional filtering by name, location, and field.

parameters.name: field
parameters.description: Filter by job field/field of work

get.description: Returns details of a specific company along with its active job ads.

post.description: Allows a job seeker to follow a specific company.

403.description: Only job seekers can follow companies

delete.description: Allows a job seeker to unfollow a company.

get.description: Returns a list of companies followed by the current job seeker.

post.description: Allows a company to upload verification files (PDF/Images) to a private storage.

get.description: Get verification status for the authenticated company.
Returns a list of all active courses available for enrollment.
Returns detailed information about a specific course.
Get my enrollments.
Get employer's courses.

post.description: Publish a course (change status to Active).

get.description: Get course enrollments (for employer).
Public job search with filters for keywords, location, salary, etc.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search keyword in title, description, and requirements

parameters.name: work_type
parameters.description: Filter by work type (Full-time, Part-time, Contract, Internship)

parameters.name: workplace_type
parameters.description: Filter by workplace type (Remote, On-site, Hybrid)

parameters.name: industry
parameters.description: Filter by industry (company field of work)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order: latest (default), salary_desc, salary_asc, popular

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific job.

post.description: Add job to favorites (for job seekers).

get.description: Get user's favorite jobs.
Returns jobs that match the active or specified CV of the job seeker.

parameters.name: cv_id
parameters.description: CV ID for matching. If missing, uses the latest CV.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of suggested jobs based on the job seeker's skills (from their latest CV) and field of work. Requires an active CV with skills.

403.description: Only job seekers can access suggested jobs

get.description: Get employer's job listings.

post.description: Publish a job (change status to Active).
Close a job (change status to Closed).

get.description: Returns a ranked list of job seekers whose CVs match the job requirements.
Returns a paginated list of job seekers with optional search and location filters.
Get notifications. Note: New notifications are also broadcasted via Laravel Reverb websockets on the channel `private-App.Models.User.{id}`.
Returns the current notification preferences for the user.

put.description: Updates the notification preferences for the user.

get.description: Returns the merged data of the authenticated user and their specific profile.

post.description: Creates or updates the profile for the authenticated user based on their role.

delete.description:
Delete current user's profile.
User Story: Create & Update & Delete Profile

get.description: Returns statistics for the current user.
Returns a list of skills, optionally filtered by category or search term.

post.description: Creates a new skill in the system catalog. Useful when a user cannot find a skill they want to add.

get.description: Returns a list of skill categories.
Returns a list of available languages.

post.description: Creates a new language in the system catalog. Useful when a user cannot find a language they want to add.
